history.content:
<thought>
I am at (2,2) facing right. Directly ahead is lava at (2,3), so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to avoid lava and eventually reach the goal at (4,4). Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move forward safely to (3,2) next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 1, col 1 facing down. The goal is at row 3, col 3. Directly ahead is an empty cell at (2,1), safe to move. I will move downward to start heading toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down. The goal is at (3,3). Directly ahead is safe but leads to a dead end (lava to the right). I need to go right along row2 first, then down to goal. So I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). Moving forward will take me to (2,2), an empty cell, bringing me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,2) facing right. Moving forward will take me to (2,3), an empty cell, which is one step closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing right. The goal is directly below me at (3,3). I need to turn right to face down, then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down and the goal is directly below me at (3,3). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
